chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D206of 2017: Nale Mithoand another Vs. The Secretary, Government of Sindh &others For the Petitioner: In person Date of hearing: 03.03.2022 Date of announcement: 03.03.2022 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This petition, filed in 2017, seeks to assert the entitlement to employment based upon a recruitment process of 2007. At the very outset, the petitioner was confronted with the issue of latches, however, he remained unable to provide any cogent justificationof the ten years' delay. In view hereof, this petition, found to be misconceived, is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
